sources.title: King Of The Underworld 1939 Bogart
sources.description: Bogart plays a gangster (big surprise) who tries to get a doctor to work for him etc.

metadata.Plot: Niles and Carole Nelson are married doctors who save one of gang lord Gurney's men. Gurney exploits them, then kills Niles leaving Carole to take the fall. He next kidnaps writer Bill Stephens to write his biography. Knowing Bill will be killed when the biography is finished, Carole takes matters into her own hands.
metadata.Writer: George Bricker, Vincent Sherman, W.R. Burnett
metadata.Actors: Humphrey Bogart, Kay Francis, James Stephenson
